title: VeriPost Mobile Proof Mini App Specification
summary: Implementation uses logged-in World App account context plus backend World ID Address Book verification as the active production proof path. Compose waits in place for account context, submits { draftText, worldAppAccount } to /api/proofs with x-veripost-world-app-flow: account-context, uses keepalive runtime-diagnostics fallback when sendBeacon is unavailable, and does not call MiniKit.walletAuth, wallet-auth nonce routes, IDKit, X login, ethereum.request, fallback wallet, connector navigation, app-owned navigation, wallet-auth/sign native commands, or /api/world-proof/request from Post. Redirect-capable MiniKit command methods and direct native bridge command payloads other than init fail closed before and after React hydration with redacted diagnostics. Stale auth, authenticate/authorize aliases, dashed/underscored sign-in/log-in/world-auth aliases, mini app shell, root handoff, hash handoff, history push/replace, direct hashchange, pre-hydration native command, and service-worker controlled-client stale URL entrypoints are guarded or recovered in-app without external Location or target leakage; safe /proof/* paths, clean World-style ?path=/ launches, and post-proof tweet intents remain allowed. Focused auth-alias and runtime/compose tests, pnpm verify with 207 Vitest tests plus 7 GOALS contract tests, audit, deployment, and production probes/log checks passed. Deployed dpl_EsifHZiSoGzi8PXnbn1tUxmouH2Y to https://veripost.io. Real-device account-context proof-ready/proof-created evidence remains pending.
next_action: Run a real World App device test: open VeriPost inside World App, tap Post, stay in the mini app, use the already logged-in World App account context without wallet-auth or external navigation, reach proof-ready, and confirm world_account_context_detected, world_proof_ready, and world_proof_created in production logs.
blockers: Real World App device account-context proof-ready/proof-created evidence is still missing.
Public World ecosystem listing metadata still contains stale X-login/private World ID proof copy as of 2026-06-01T11:16:52Z and must be updated in Developer Portal.
World App Store submission still requires support email confirmation and final review submission.

verification.notes: Focused dashed/underscored stale auth-alias recovery tests passed with 64 tests, covering redacted launch-query classification, /sign-in and /log_in stale path recovery, /api/sign-in and /api/log_in traps, /world/sign-in and /world-auth traps, ?logIn=true and ?sign_in=true root-query recovery, ?path=/sign-in and ?path=/api/log_in root-handoff recovery, head/hydrated guards, and GOALS contract checks. Broader runtime/compose tests passed with 102 tests, covering legacy auth cleanup, compose flow, no-native-proof compose flow, World App runtime, runtime diagnostics, and GOALS checks. pnpm verify passed with lint, typecheck, 21 Vitest files, 207 Vitest tests, 7 GOALS contract tests, and Next build; pnpm audit --audit-level moderate, service-worker byte identity, Spectacula validation, JSON validation, and git diff --check passed. Deployed dpl_EsifHZiSoGzi8PXnbn1tUxmouH2Y to https://veripost.io. Production probes confirmed root marker/header/no-store/Clear-Site-Data, /sign-in and /log_in static-fetch recovery, /api/sign-in and /api/log_in static-fetch recovery for sparse World App requests, /world/sign-in and /world-auth static-fetch recovery, /api/sign-in JSON 410, ?logIn=true and ?sign_in=true static-fetch query recovery, service-worker alias markers, config/health, fake account-context proof rejection with world_address_unverified, and recovery responses with no external Location. Vercel logs show path-source legacy_auth_entrypoint_blocked for /sign-in, /log_in, /api/sign-in, /api/log_in, /world/sign-in, and /world-auth; query-source legacy_auth_entrypoint_blocked for logIn/sign_in/path/next keys only; and fake proof rejection. Current logs contain no real-device world_account_context_detected, world_proof_request_started, world_proof_ready, or world_proof_created entries, so real-device proof evidence is still missing.

resume_context.notes: The current source uses logged-in World App account context plus backend Address Book verification as the only proof path. MiniKit.walletAuth is not called, /api/world-wallet-auth/nonce is removed and trapped as stale, and /api/world-proof/request, IDKit helpers, X login, ethereum.request, fallback wallets, connectors, wallet-auth/sign native commands, and app-owned redirect navigation stay out of the Post action. Redirect-capable MiniKit command methods and direct native bridge command payloads other than init are guarded before and after React hydration, including bridge targets injected shortly after the head script runs. Hydrated diagnostics use sendBeacon first and fetch keepalive fallback; the head-installed early guard also sends one redacted world_runtime_initial diagnostic before React hydration when likely World App runtime evidence is present. Production deployment dpl_EsifHZiSoGzi8PXnbn1tUxmouH2Y confirmed root marker/header, static-fetch recovery or JSON 410 for stale sign-in/log-in/world-auth aliases, service-worker alias recovery markers, fake account-context proof rejection with world_address_unverified, and redacted logs for path/query traps. Current production logs still contain zero real-device world_account_context_detected/proof-ready/proof-created entries. The direct world.org listing probe at 2026-06-01T11:16:52Z still contains stale Log in with X/private World ID proof copy, resolves through the ecosystem page, and must be updated in Developer Portal.
